issues.title: Write unit tests for all logic classes
issues.description:
Write comprehensive unit tests for all pure Dart logic classes. These have zero Flame dependency and are fast to test.

`test/logic/road_graph_test.dart`: Graph construction, `segmentsAt`, `vehiclesOn`, `isRangeFree`, immutable updates (moveVehicle, removeVehicle, moveAmbulance).

`test/logic/move_validator_test.dart`: Valid moves, boundary checks, collision detection, node crossing validation, blocked crossing.

`test/logic/ambulance_ai_test.da… (truncated, use `get_issue` for full description)

issues.title: Implement HealthBar (constant countdown + star calculation)
issues.description:
Implement `HealthBar` in `lib/logic/health_bar.dart`. Pure Dart.

* `maxHealth` (seconds, from level JSON)
* `remaining` getter, `fraction` getter (remaining/max)
* `isDepleted` — uses `<= 0`, NOT `== 0`
* `tick(deltaTime)` — called every game frame, clamps to \[0, maxHealth\]
* `stars(thresholds)` — calculates star rating from remaining health fraction

Health bar depletes at a **constant rate** regardless of ambulance state. Starts when level … (truncated, use `get_issue` for full description)

issues.title: Implement LevelLoader (JSON parsing into full game state)
issues.description:
Implement `LevelLoader` in `lib/logic/level_loader.dart`. Pure Dart.

`load(Map<String, dynamic> json)` — Parses level JSON into a complete game state record:

* `RoadGraph graph` (nodes, segments, vehicles, ambulance)
* `HealthBar healthBar` (from `healthBar` field in seconds)
* `Map<int, double> starThresholds` (3/2/1 star → health fraction)
* `String levelName`, `String difficulty`

Parsing:

1. Parse `nodes` list → `Map<String, RoadNode>`
2.… (truncated, use `get_issue` for full description)

issues.title: Implement AmbulanceAI (BFS pathfinding + segment checks)
issues.description:
Implement `AmbulanceAI` in `lib/logic/ambulance_ai.dart`. Pure Dart, zero Flame imports. Custom BFS — no external pathfinding package (they only support grids).

`findPath(graph)` — EXPENSIVE: Full BFS from ambulance position to exit node. Returns ordered list of node IDs, or null. Only called when `_pathDirty` flag is set or at intersections.

`canAdvanceNextSegment(graph)` — CHEAP: O(n) check where n = vehicles on next segment (0-3 typically).… (truncated, use `get_issue` for full description)

issues.title: Implement MoveValidator (segment movement + node crossing)
issues.description:
Implement `MoveValidator` in `lib/logic/move_validator.dart`. Pure Dart, zero Flame imports.

`validateMove(vehicle, delta, graph)`: Validates movement along current segment. Checks bounds (can't exceed segment capacity) and collisions with other vehicles + ambulance. Returns clamped delta (0 if impossible).

`validateCrossing(vehicle, targetNodeId, targetSegmentId, graph)`: Validates crossing through a node to an adjacent segment. Determines en… (truncated, use `get_issue` for full description)

issues.title: Implement RoadGraph with node/segment queries
issues.description:
Implement `RoadGraph` in `lib/logic/road_graph.dart`. Pure Dart, zero Flame imports.

**Fields**: `Map<String, RoadNode> nodes`, `Map<String, RoadSegment> segments`, `List<Vehicle> vehicles`, `Ambulance ambulance`.

**Query methods**:

* `segmentsAt(nodeId)` — all segments connected to a node
* `vehiclesOn(segmentId)` — vehicles on a specific segment
* `isRangeFree(segmentId, start, end)` — check if range is free (also checks ambulance)
* `neigh… (truncated, use `get_issue` for full description)

issues.title: Implement models: RoadNode, RoadSegment, Vehicle, Ambulance, IntendedDirection
issues.description:
Implement all core data models in `lib/models/`. All models extend `Equatable` for value equality.

**RoadNode** (`models/road_node.dart`): `id`, `x`, `y` coordinates. Props by `id`.

**RoadSegment** (`models/road_segment.dart`): `id`, `fromNodeId`, `toNodeId`, `capacity` (int, vehicle units that fit), optional `waypoints` for curved rendering. Includes `freeSpace()` method.

**Vehicle** (`models/vehicle.dart`): `id`, `type` (car/truck), `sprite… (truncated, use `get_issue` for full description)

issues.title: Implement phase transitions: planning → active
issues.description:
Implement `PhaseManager` in `lib/game/managers/phase_manager.dart` and integrate phase logic into `ClearAheadGame`.

**Planning phase**: Ambulance is stationary (siren on). Player clears initial path. After every valid player move, call `AmbulanceAI.findPath()` (guarded by `_pathDirty` flag). If a valid path exists → transition to active phase.

**Active phase**: Ambulance starts driving. Player keeps moving vehicles in real-time (no pause, no c… (truncated, use `get_issue` for full description)

issues.title: Implement drag-to-move for non-ambulance vehicles
issues.description:
Implement drag-to-move UX in `lib/game/components/drag_handler.dart` using Flame's `DragCallbacks` mixin.

**Interaction flow**:

1. Touch vehicle → highlight (subtle glow/scale-up)
2. Drag → vehicle follows finger along current segment axis only. Constrained to segment direction. Snaps to unit boundaries.
3. Release → snap to nearest whole-unit offset. If position changed, `moveCount++`.

**MoveValidator integration**: Check continuously during… (truncated, use `get_issue` for full description)

issues.title: Create ClearAheadGame rendering roads and vehicles as rectangles
issues.description:
Create `ClearAheadGame` (FlameGame subclass) in `lib/game/clear_ahead_game.dart`. This is the central game class that ties logic and rendering together.

**Components to create**:

* `RoadComponent` — renders road segments as filled rectangles between node positions. Straight segments = rectangle. Width = `worldScale * 0.8`. Color: dark gray.
* `NodeComponent` — renders intersections as circles at node positions. Radius = `worldScale * 0.5`.

issues.description:
Integration task: wire everything together so `level_001.json` is fully playable end-to-end.

issues.title: Implement auto-clear for passed vehicles
issues.description:
Implement `AutoClearManager` in `lib/game/managers/auto_clear_manager.dart` and `ClearAheadGame._tickAutoClear()`.

**Logic**: Every frame during active phase, check each vehicle. When the ambulance has passed a vehicle by 2+ segments (measured along the ambulance's traveled path, not straight-line distance):

1. **Immediately remove from RoadGraph** — `graph = graph.removeVehicle(vehicleId)`. The graph is the source of truth and must stay clean… (truncated, use `get_issue` for full description)

issues.title: Implement autonomous ambulance movement with acceleration
issues.description:
Implement ambulance driving logic in `ClearAheadGame._tickAmbulance(dt)`.

**Every frame during active phase**:

1. Call `AmbulanceAI.canAdvanceNextSegment(graph)` (cheap O(n) check)
2. If blocked → reset speed to base, wait
3. If clear → advance ambulance by `speed * dt` units
4. When ambulance crosses into a new segment → accelerate (speed += 0.3, capped at 8.0)
5. When ambulance reaches exit node → `phase = GamePhase.won`

**Movement mechanic… (truncated, use `get_issue` for full description)

Dev dependencies: `flutter_test`, `build_runner`, `json_serializable`, `mocktail`.
